zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Dodington於1430年出生在英國諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可時，她的父親Thomas de Doddington51歲，母親Beatrix Batchelder51歲。她於1445年之前與William Folcard在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可洛斯特維其可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 多丁頓享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dodington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Doddington
meanings: English: locative name from any of several places called Doddington (Cambs, Kent, Lincs, Cheshire, Northumb) or Dodington (Gloucs, Somerset, Shrops), or from Dry Doddington (Lincs), Great Doddington (Northants). In addition, Dunton (Bucks), Denton (Northants), Derrington (Staffs), and Detton Hall (Shrops) all appear in Domesday Book as Dodintone, and may have contributed to the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Dodington was born in 1430, in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, her father, Thomas de Doddington, was 51 and her mother, Beatrix Batchelder, was 51. She married William Folcard before 1445, in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1476, in Great Doddington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Dodington est née en 1430, à Crostwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Doddington, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Beatrix Batchelder, avait 51 ans. Elle a épousé William Folcard avant 1445, à Crostwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1476, à Great Doddington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

Sie hat vor 1445 in Crostwick, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom William Folcard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1476 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Great Doddington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato William Folcard prima del 1445, nel Crostwick, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Joan Dodingtonが1430年にイギリスノーフォルククロストウィックで生まれた時，父Thomas de Doddingtonは51歳，母Beatrix Batchelderは51歳であった。1445年以前にイギリスイギリスノーフォルククロストウィックでWilliam Folcardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト ドッドイントンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Dodington(이)가 1430년 영국 노르폴크 크로스트윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Doddington(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix Batchelder(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 1445년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 크로스트윅에서 William Folcard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 그리트 도딩턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com William Folcard antes 1445, em Crostwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Dodington родилась в 1430 г. в местности кроствикк, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Doddington было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Beatrix Batchelder, 51. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Folcard перед 1445 г. в местности кроствикк, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1476 г. в местности грит доддингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.
